summary.intent: Review and address PR #472 (moltis-org/moltis) review comments, fix the issues, and resolve all review conversations.
summary.outcome: Fixed serialize_struct field count hints across all four notification crates (discord, telegram, slack, msteams), committed and pushed the fix, and resolved all review threads on the PR.

repo: RedactedConfig writes REDACTED constant directly, making serialize_secret_redacted and serialize_option_secret_redacted helpers dead code.
Each notification channel (discord, telegram, slack, msteams) has its own config.rs with manual Serialize impls using serialize_struct — field count hints must match actual field counts.
Telegram had 16→17 fields (more than initially assumed), caught as a side effect of fixing the field count issue.

code.finding: serialize_struct field count hint was passing max fields rather than actual count; fixed to use dynamic/accurate count.
serialize_struct field count hint fixed to reflect actual fields.

workflow: GitHub GraphQL API is used to programmatically resolve PR review threads after pushing fixes.
Review threads require review ID and comment IDs to resolve via GraphQL — these must be fetched before resolving.
Running clippy and tests on only the changed crates (not the whole workspace) is sufficient for targeted fixes like this.

friction: New review comment appeared after initial round of fixes, requiring a second pass over the PR.
